title: Rusty Robots
description: A resource pack that turns Copper Golems into retro style toy robots! The robots still oxidize over time and have emissive lights on top of their head that turn off when deactivated.
body:
The robots will still oxidize over time and have emissive lights on top of their head that turn off when deactivated/fully oxidized.

This pack is intended to be a festive version of copper golems that still makes sense lore-wise.
